paid_credit_api_calls.note: apply_reached/evaluate_reached/adoption_gate_ever_passed/promote_reached/candidate_promoted reflect the best-known cumulative state across all triaged runs to date. data/api_usage_ledger.json records 23 primary-model success records. Runs 5 and 6 are triaged as evaluate_rejected. Run 7 (2026-06-16T06:20:37) is API/token success only and remains untriaged. Run 8 (2026-06-17, id=27683267711) passed the adoption gate and reached promote; the original promote push failed (push-race); candidate was recovered via owner-audited recovery on 2026-06-18 — hash verified, promote_candidate.py re-executed, generation 3 written to core/detector.py. Run 9 (2026-06-18, run #59) is the owner-approved paid-credit run that successfully promoted generation 4 (score 948.04, hash ebb8799d…) to core/detector.py via the standard workflow promote path. Run 10 (2026-06-19T14:43:51) is API/token success only and remains untriaged. Runs 11-13 (2026-06-21, run #64/#65/#66) are triaged as evaluate_rejected: Gemini generated code missing all five symbolic indicator strings (missing_baseline_symbolic_indicator_runtime). Propose-prompt hardening was implemented in the claude/repository-progress-ni8lko branch (PR #156) to prevent recurrence. Run 14 (2026-06-22T02:32:07) and run 15 (2026-06-23T10:44:04) are API/token success only and remain untriaged. Runs 16-19 (2026-06-23, runs #71-#74) are the first owner-driven ignition of the autonomous loop: #71 used the legacy gemini-paid-credit mode (raw-Python path, no structured candidate); #72-#74 used structured-gemini-paid-credit + structured_baseline and each produced a structured candidate that was REJECTED by the adoption gate (fp_rate 0.0 but missed regression/holdout/drift floors). After 3 consecutive structured gate failures the consecutive-failure circuit breaker TRIPPED (data/circuit_breaker.json: tripped=true, consecutive_failures=3); detector_mode remains legacy (no unsafe promotion reached production). Ledger then recorded 19 primary-model paid-credit success records (token/API success only; #72-74 did NOT promote). Post-ignition, the structured first-activation (baseline) adoption floor was made realistic: holdout/drift generalization tiers use min_holdout_pass_rate_baseline / min_drift_pass_rate_baseline (default 0.5) instead of an absolute 1.0 wall, while false-positive safety (counterfactual + max_fp_rate), regression, and latency stay strict; generation 2+ remains strict + must beat the active structured score (parity guard). The structured proposer prompt was also strengthened for broader, more precise signature coverage. Runs 20-21 (2026-06-24, runs #75/#76) FAILED at propose with an output-contract error: the strengthened (larger) ruleset was truncated mid-JSON because genome.max_output_tokens was 2048 ('Unterminated string ... char 5596'); the API calls succeeded (ledger +2 = 21 primary-model successes) but no candidate was produced, so the circuit breaker recorded 2 failures (2/3, not tripped). Fix (per Codex PR #183 P1 — NO paid-credit/model/budget setting changed): max_output_tokens stays 2048; instead the proposer now emits COMPACT (minified) JSON and bounds the ruleset to ~24-40 concise signatures (schema max 64) so a comprehensive document fits within the unchanged 2048 token cap and is never truncated. The breaker was reset to 0 (the failures were caused by the truncation bug, not genuine gate rejections). daily_api_budget_usd=0.25 and monthly_api_budget_usd=10.0 are unchanged. Run 22 (2026-06-24, run #78, id 28095623368) ran on main AFTER PR #183 merged (compact fix live) with structured-gemini-paid-credit: propose SUCCEEDED with NO truncation (schema_valid=true, code_chars=6253 — past the 5596-char truncation point of #75/#76), validating the compact-output fix live; the candidate was then REJECTED by the adoption gate for the SINGLE reason regression_pass_rate=0.750<1.000 (fp_rate=0.0, holdout_pass_rate=1.0, drift_pass_rate=1.0, counterfactual_pass_rate=1.0 all passed) — a canonical known attack (destructive/stacked SQLi) was missed. Promote Structured Rules was SKIPPED (promote_approved not set; no unsafe promotion). Ledger +1 = 22 primary-model successes; circuit breaker recorded 1 failure (1/3, not tripped). Follow-up: proposer prompt now mandates canonical regression signatures (destructive SQLi e.g. drop table + core path-traversal) to reach 100% regression coverage. Run 23 (2026-06-26, run #80, id 28220768075) ran on main with structured-gemini-paid-credit + promote_approved=true: propose SUCCEEDED and the structured candidate PASSED the adoption gate, so Promote Structured Rules published it — the FIRST structured promotion to flip the committed genome.detector_mode legacy→structured_rules (active_structured_rules.json, score 154.41; legacy lineage generation=4/best_score=948.04 unchanged). Pre-publish health check passed; circuit breaker recorded success (0/3). Ledger +1 = 23 primary-model successes. The active runtime detector is now structured_rules (blocks 100% of the neutralized realistic corpus, FP 0.0%; does NOT match the symbolic indicator corpus the legacy detector matched).

propose_side_hardening.meaning: The Gemini propose prompt now states an explicit baseline-preservation contract: keep all five symbolic indicators (path_traversal_indicator, script_injection_indicator, sqli_indicator, command_delimiter_indicator, encoded_traversal_indicator), keep the full request inspection surface (method, path, query, headers, body), keep the final non-blocking blocked=False fallback return, and make a minimal additive edit that scores strictly above previous_best. Prompt-only/documentation change; no API call, no detector/policy/budget/model/ledger change.

score_schema_migration.new_best_score_meaning: Recomputed for current core/detector.py under the generation-invariant formula (changed_lines excluded). This is a score-schema migration only, not a promotion.
score_schema_migration.runs_5_6_historical_note: Runs 5 and 6 scores (494.48 and 478.12) are historical records under the old formula. They remain classified as evaluate_rejected under their recorded historical gate. The new formula does not retroactively change their classification.
score_schema_migration.run_7_note: The 7th primary-model success record remains API/token success only and untriaged. This migration does not infer apply, evaluate, adoption, or promote from run 7.

layer_2_value_validation.meaning: Evaluation path validated on a small canonical neutralized corpus; the gen-4 symbolic detector detected 0.0% of realistic threats and a structured ruleset detected 100.0% (FP 0.0%). Acceptance is bounded: it validates the evaluation path and quantifies the symbolic wall plus a safe route to close it.
